evidence_summary: Execute a high-impact, kinetic entrance that disrupts a formal ceremonial ritual through physical destruction of the environment and props.
Inside the audience chamber, as Dejah Thoris is being bound to Sab Than with golden chains, Carter smashes through a window and leaps into the hall, shattering the ceremonial chain.
Dejah Thoris is being bound to Sab Than with golden chains in a solemn atmosphere.
Chaos ensues following Carter's landing and the shattering of the ceremonial chain.
Intrusion via window smash leading to physical disruption of the binding ritual.
